system_prompt: You are an OpenFOAM debugging planner. Given current foam files, error logs and reviewer analysis, create a minimal rewrite plan. Output MUST be strict JSON only, with this exact schema: {"target_files": [{"file": "relative/path", "changes": "change1; change2"}]}. Rules: 1) Do not use markdown, backticks, or comments. 2) Use double quotes for all strings. 3) In changes, use short plain text actions separated by semicolons. 4) Do not include parentheses, backticks, or quote characters inside changes text. 5) Do not include run steps; only file edits.
user_prompt:
<foamfiles>list_foamfile=[FoamfilePydantic(file_name='blockMeshDict', folder_name='system', content='FoamFile

// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

scale   1;

vertices
(

blocks

    hex (16 17 18 19 20 21 22 23) (10 20 1) simpleGrading (1 1 1)

);

edges
(
);

boundary
(

    {

        faces
        (
            (0 3 7 4)
        );
    }

        (
            (25 26 30 29)
        );
    }

mergePatchPairs
(
);

// ************************************************************************* //'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='controlDict', folder_name='system', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    location    "system";
    object      controlDict;
}

application     pimpleFoam;

startFrom       startTime;

startTime       0;

stopAt          endTime;

endTime         0.5;

deltaT          0.0025;

writeControl    runTime;

writeInterval   0.05;

purgeWrite      0;

writeFormat     ascii;

writePrecision  6;

writeCompression off;

timeFormat      general;

timePrecision   6;

runTimeModifiable true;'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='fvSchemes', folder_name='system', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    object      fvSchemes;
}
// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

ddtSchemes
{
    default         Euler;
}

gradSchemes
{
    default         Gauss linear;
    grad(p)         Gauss linear;
    grad(U)         Gauss linear;
}

divSchemes
{
    default         none;
    div(phi,U)      Gauss linearUpwind grad(U);
    div((nuEff*dev2(T(grad(U))))) Gauss linear;
}

laplacianSchemes
{
    default         Gauss linear corrected;
}

interpolationSchemes
{
    default         linear;
}

snGradSchemes
{
    default         corrected;
}

// ************************************************************************* //'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='fvSolution', folder_name='system', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    object      fvSolution;
}
// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

solvers
{
    p
    {
        solver          GAMG;
        tolerance       1e-06;
        relTol          0.01;
        smoother        GaussSeidel;
    }

    pFinal
    {
        $p;
        relTol          0;
    }

    "(U|k|omega)"
    {
        solver          smoothSolver;
        smoother        symGaussSeidel;
        tolerance       1e-06;
        relTol          0.01;
    }

    "(U|k|omega)Final"
    {
        $U;
        relTol          0;
    }
}

PIMPLE
{
    nOuterCorrectors    2;
    nCorrectors         1;
    nNonOrthogonalCorrectors 0;
    pRefCell            0;
    pRefValue           0;
}

// ************************************************************************* //'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='momentumTransport', folder_name='constant', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    object      momentumTransport;
}

simulationType  laminar;

laminar
{
    laminarModel    generalizedNewtonian;

    generalizedNewtonianCoeffs
    {
        viscosityModel  CrossPowerLaw;

        nuInf   10;
        m       0.4;
        n       3;
    }
}'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='physicalProperties', folder_name='constant', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    location    "constant";
    object      physicalProperties;
}

transportModel  Newtonian;

nu              0.01;'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='U', folder_name='0', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       volVectorField;
    object      U;
}
// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

dimensions      [0 1 -1 0 0 0 0];

internalField   uniform (0 0 0);

boundaryField
{
    inlet
    {
        type            fixedValue;
        value           uniform (1 0 0);
    }

    outlet
    {
        type            zeroGradient;
    }

    top
    {
        type            noSlip;
    }

    bottom
    {
        type            noSlip;
    }

    cylinder
    {
        type            noSlip;
    }

    defaultFaces
    {
        type            empty;
    }
}

// ************************************************************************* //'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='p', folder_name='0', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       volScalarField;
    object      p;
}
// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

dimensions      [0 2 -2 0 0 0 0];

internalField   uniform 0;

boundaryField
{
    inlet
    {
        type            zeroGradient;
    }

    outlet
    {
        type            fixedValue;
        value           uniform 0;
    }

    top
    {
        type            zeroGradient;
    }

    bottom
    {
        type            zeroGradient;
    }

    cylinder
    {
        type            zeroGradient;
    }

    defaultFaces
    {
        type            empty;
    }
}

// ************************************************************************* //')]</foamfiles>

Unknown laminarModel type generalizedNewtonian

Valid laminarModel types:

6
(
Giesekus
Maxwell

Stokes
generalisedNewtonian
lambdaThixotropic
)


    From function static Foam::autoPtr<Foam::laminarModel<BasicMomentumTransportModel> > Foam::laminarModel<BasicMomentumTransportModel>::New(const alphaField&, const rhoField&, const Foam::volVectorField&, const Foam::surfaceScalarField&, const Foam::surfaceScalarField&, const Foam::viscosity&) [with BasicMomentumTransportModel = Foam::incompressibleMomentumTransportModel; alphaField = Foam::geometricOneField; rhoField = Foam::geometricOneField; Foam::volVectorField = Foam::GeometricField<Foam::Vector<double>, Foam::fvPatchField, Foam::volMesh>; Foam::surfaceScalarField = Foam::GeometricField<double, Foam::fvsPatchField, Foam::surfaceMesh>]
    in file ../momentumTransportModels/lnInclude/laminarModel.C at line 117.

FOAM exiting'}]</error_logs>
<review_analysis># Error Diagnosis and Resolution

## Error Analysis

The error message is clear:

```
Unknown laminarModel type generalizedNewtonian

Valid laminarModel types:
(
Giesekus
Maxwell
PTT
Stokes
generalisedNewtonian
lambdaThixotropic
)
```

The issue is a **spelling mismatch**. The `momentumTransport` file specifies `generalizedNewtonian`, but the valid model name listed by OpenFOAM is `generalisedNewtonian` (British English spelling with an 's').

Additionally, looking at the current `momentumTransport` file, there are further problems:

1. **Missing `CrossPowerLaw` sub-dictionary**: The `generalisedNewtonian` model requires a `CrossPowerLaw` sub-dictionary containing the coefficients (`nuInf`, `m`, `n`). Without it, the solver won't know the viscosity parameters.

2. **Incorrect `nu` value conflict**: The user requirement states to use a constant viscosity model with `nu = 0.01` in `physicalProperties`. However, since the user also explicitly requests a `generalizedNewtonian` (Cross Power Law) model in `momentumTransport`, the `nu` entry in `physicalProperties` may become redundant/conflicting. This should be resolved by either removing `nu` from `physicalProperties` or ensuring the two models agree — but given the explicit request for the Cross Power Law model, keeping `nu` might cause confusion.

## Proposed Fixes

### 1. Fix `constant/momentumTransport`

Change `generalizedNewtonian` → `generalisedNewtonian` (correct British English spelling):

```
laminar
{
    laminarModel    generalisedNewtonian;

    generalizedNewtonianCoeffs
    {
        viscosityModel  CrossPowerLaw;
        nuInf   10;
        m       0.4;
        n       3;
    }
}
```

Also ensure the `CrossPowerLaw` sub-dictionary is present under `generalizedNewtonianCoeffs`. The current file already has it, so only the spelling change is needed.

### 2. Review `constant/physicalProperties`

Since the user explicitly requests the Cross Power Law generalized Newtonian model (which overrides the simple constant `nu`), the `nu 0.01;` entry in `physicalProperties` becomes less critical. However, having it there shouldn't cause harm. No changes needed here unless you want to remove it for clarity.

### Summary

The single required fix is correcting the spelling from `generalizedNewtonian` to `generalisedNewtonian` in the `momentumTransport` file. All other configurations appear consistent with the user requirements and the reference case.</review_analysis>
<user_requirement>do a laminar offsetcylinder simulation. Use PIMPLE algorithm with a generalized Newtonian model and Cross-Power-Law viscosity for momentum transport, characterized by specific parameters nuInf=10, m=0.4, n=3. Boundary conditions specify a fixed velocity of 1m/s at the inlet (left),zero gradient pressure at the outlet (right), and no-slip conditions for walls, including the cylinder surface. Use timestep of 0.0025 and output every 0.05. Finaltime is 0.5. use constant viscosity model with nu value of 0.01 in physical properties.</user_requirement>
Return strict JSON now with key target_files only.
response: target_files=[PlannedFileChange(file='constant/momentumTransport', changes='Change laminarModel from generalizedNewtonian to generalisedNewtonian to match correct OpenFOAM spelling')]
